# Vitest Unit Tests — OctoCAT API

## When to Use This Skill
- Writing new tests for an API route or repository file
- Increasing test coverage for the `api/` workspace
- Asked to "test", "write tests", "add unit tests", or "improve coverage" for backend code

## Testing Stack

| Tool | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `vitest` | Test runner & assertion library |
| `supertest` | HTTP-level route testing against a real Express app |
| `better-sqlite3` | In-memory SQLite DB (`new Database(':memory:')`) |
| `src/db/migrate.ts` | Applies all migrations to the in-memory DB |

## Canonical Setup Pattern

See [test-template.ts](./test-template.ts) for a ready-to-use scaffold. The key shape is:

```typescript
import { describe, it, expect, beforeEach, vi } from 'vitest';
import request from 'supertest';
import express from 'express';
import Database from 'better-sqlite3';
import { migrate } from '../../db/migrate';

let db: Database.Database;
let app: express.Express;

beforeEach(() => {
  db = new Database(':memory:');
  migrate(db);
  app = express();
  app.use(express.json());
  app.use('/entities', createEntityRouter(db));
});
```

## Coverage Checklist

### Happy Paths
- [ ] `GET /` → `200` + non-empty array
- [ ] `GET /:id` → `200` + correct entity (camelCase, booleans as `true`/`false`)
- [ ] `POST /` → `201` + persisted entity
- [ ] `PUT /:id` → `200` + updated fields
- [ ] `DELETE /:id` → `200`/`204` + entity removed

### Error Paths
- [ ] `GET /:id` unknown → `404`
- [ ] `PUT /:id` unknown → `404`
- [ ] `DELETE /:id` unknown → `404`
- [ ] `POST /` missing required field → `400`/`422`
- [ ] `POST /` duplicate unique value → `409`

### Edge Cases
- [ ] Empty collection → `200` + `[]`
- [ ] Malformed `:id` (non-integer) → `400`/`404`
- [ ] `PUT` partial body → only supplied fields updated

## Data Conventions
- Assert **camelCase** response fields (`supplierId`, `isActive`) — never snake_case
- SQLite booleans (`0`/`1`) must come back as JS `true`/`false` — assert this explicitly
- Use `toMatchObject` for partial shape checks; `toEqual` for full objects

## Output Location & Naming

Save the generated file to:
```
api/generated/skill-vitest-unit-tests/{source-basename}.{YYYYMMDD-HHmmss}.test.ts
```

- `{source-basename}` — name of the source file without extension (e.g. `supplier` from `supplier.ts`)
- `{YYYYMMDD-HHmmss}` — current date and time (e.g. `20260302-143000`)

Example: `api/generated/skill-vitest-unit-tests/supplier.20260302-143000.test.ts`

Do **not** place the file adjacent to the source. Adjust all relative import paths accordingly (e.g. `../../../src/routes/supplier`). As the **very first line** of the file, add:

```typescript
// 🤖 Generated by: skill-vitest-unit-tests | {source-basename}.ts | {YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss}
```

## Reference
Always read `src/routes/branch.test.ts` first — it is the authoritative existing test pattern in this repo.

## Auth Middleware
Tests that hit routes protected by auth middleware should mock it:
```typescript
vi.mock('../../middleware/auth', () => ({
  requireAuth: (_req: any, _res: any, next: any) => next(),
}));
```

## Running Tests
```bash
# from repo root
npm run test --workspace=api
npm run test:coverage --workspace=api
```
